species.citation: (L.) Hook.f. & Thomson , Fl. Ind. (Hooker f. & Thomson) 1 (1855) 183 ; Forman, Kew Bull. 36 (1981) 394; Fl. Males., ser. 1, 10 (1986) 194; ≡ Menispermum crispum L. , Sp. Pl., 2nd Ed. (1763) 1468. = Tinospora rumphii Boerl. , Cat. Pl. Phan. (1901) 116, nom. illeg. ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 146.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Cambodia, China, India, Indian Ocean, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Singapore. BASILAN, CULION, LUZON: Rizal (photos), MINDANAO, MINDORO.
species.notes: Usually found in thickets near human settlements, probably in most islands and provinces on account of being commonly planted for medicinal purposes. Also reported in primary forest in Mindanao and in dry forest in Mindoro Oriental prov. (Mt Yagaw, 1000m). According to Forman (1986) female flowers and fruits are as yet unknown from Malesia. Merrill (1923) hints at the possibility of this species as being an introduced plant in the Philippines. 0-1000m.

species.citation: (Burm.f.) Merr. , J. Arnold Arbor. 19 (1938) 340 ; Forman, Kew Bull. 36 (1981) 414; Fl. Males., ser. 1, 10 (1986) 199; ≡ Menispermum glabrum Burm.f. , Fl. Ind. (N. L. Burman) (1768) 316. = Tinospora reticulata Miers , Ann. Mag. Nat. Hist., 3rd Ser. 13 (1864) 322 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 204; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 146.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, China, Philippines, Solomon Isls. BATANES, CAGAYAN DE SULU, CULION, LUBANG, LUZON: Albay, Aurora (photos), Bataan, Benguet, Bulacan, Cagayan, Ilocos Norte (photos), Laguna, NCR, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Davao del Sur, PALAWAN, PANAY.
species.notes: Lowland dry thickets, shrubberies and re-growth forests. 0-500m.

species.citation: Diels , Pflanzenr. (Engler) IV (94) (1910) 137 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 146; Forman, Kew Bull. 36 (1981) 389; Fl. Males., ser. 1, 10 (1986) 191; Type: Clemens 525. = Tinospora negrotica Diels , Pflanzenr. (Engler) IV (94) (1910) 137 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 146; Type: Elmer 9468 (US, iso), Negros: Negros Oriental, Cuernos Mtns. Mar-1908. = Tinospora hastata Elmer , LPB 10 (1939) 3760, nom. inval., no Latin descr.; Type: Elmer 16960 (NY, iso), Luzon: Sorsogon, Mt Bulusan, Irosin, Aug-1916.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines, Sulawesi. CATANDUANES, LUZON: Benguet, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao de Oro (photos), Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Misamis Occidental, South Cotabato, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY, SAMAR.
species.notes: Thickets and forests; in Luzon and Palawan on limestone. 0-1800m.
